name: Keeping watch over the abandoned warehouse
description:
The owner of an abandoned warehouse in remote Alaska has noticed strange things happening the few times he went out there. Believing it to be looters he hired you as security.

The warehouse was oddly built way out in the middle of nowhere, probably the reason nobody uses it now, so trips to and from the warehouse aren't practical. You are staying for the whole week.

The owner gave you some basic gear, an Ithaca model 37 with 20 shells of buckshot, an old D cell army flashlight with a incandescent bulb making it almost useless, enough food and water for the week, only enough gas to run the generator for a few hours each night, a tiny wood stove to keep your room in the back office warm.

Considering your character knew they would be out there for the whole week you can add in items you think they would have brought with them. The owner only gives you the gear mentioned above.

I grew up out in the middle of nowhere in Alaska, winter can get pretty unsettling sometimes. I never saw anything strange but heard some strange things out in the woods. I've seen some UFOs before but that could have easily been test flights for new aircraft.

I am still tinkering with the optimisation so things may drastically change on short notice.

WARNING SPOILERS FROM HERE ON!

Dogman is one of the creatures you will encounter, it's very hostile.

Static electricity anomaly, it will only show up if the generator is running. It will drain the power from anything electrical.

Human puppet
creator: sextoilet
